programs.title: Gator Boys
programs.desc: The boys have three minutes to obtain blood samples from aggressive gators for an important research project.

programs.title: My Cat From Hell
programs.desc: Ambreen has been in an abusive relationship for the past 13 years, but her abuser is her cat, Calvin; Josh has two women in his life--his cat Nico and his girlfriend, who recently moved in with them. But Nico has been anything but welcoming.

programs.title: My Cat From Hell
programs.desc: A photographer who lives and works out of his home is at risk of losing his business and his assistant because of his bloodthirsty cat; a fat feline's love for food is bound to be his greatest downfall.

programs.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programs.desc: A former adopter returns for a support companion as she battles cancer; the effort to rescue an injured stray; Tia puts a new parolee through his paces.

programs.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programs.desc: Moe and Lizzy rescue a sick, scared stray, but a diagnosis proves tricky; a friend of the rescue visits in hope of adopting a dog that has previously been overlooked; new mom Tania struggles to find a balance between life and work at Villalobos.

programs.title: I Was Prey
programs.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, trail engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by grizzly bear protecting her cubs; during a vacation in the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson is snorkeling when she finds herself face-to-face with a tiger shark.
